mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, u.role_id, u.avatar, u.org_name, u.job_type, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.role_code, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = u.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, u.role_id, u.avatar, u.org_name, u.job_type, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.role_code, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = u.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, u.role_id, u.avatar, u.org_name, u.job_type, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.role_code, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = u.role_id AND r.deleted = 0
u.deleted = 0
AND r.role_code = UPPER(#{role})
AND u.status = #{status}
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.id DESC
